During [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], a '''Mos Eisley cop''' was part of the [[Mos Eisley Police Authority|local]] [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] that was hunting [[BoShek/Legends|BoShek]] for running an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] blockade and destroying four [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] in the process. Though BoShek was indeed the perpetrator, the [[Police officer/Legends|policeman]] simply wanted a pilot scapegoat to sacrifice to the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] presence that had amassed on the [[Tatooine/Legends|planet]] in pursuit of the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']]<nowiki>'s</nowiki> jettisoned [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]].

The cop and his reinforcements chased BoShek to the [[Dowager Queen/Legends|''Dowager Queen'']] where the smuggler disguised himself as a [[The Force/Legends|Force]] preaching monk, the execution of [[Het Nkik/Legends|Het Nkik]] by [[Zeta Squadron (Desert Sands)|Zeta Squadron]] below distracted the group long enough for BoShek to escape the old ship. Though the law enforcer managed to get a shot from his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], a throng of preachers now also chasing BoShek for mocking their profession provided enough cover that the man couldn't get an aim finally allowing BoShek to slip away.
